columns.Name: LEARNING_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Learning Item Id of the learning organization

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_ADMIN
columns.Comments: Visibility of the leraning organization

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_ESS
columns.Comments: Learning Organization enable for self service users to select

columns.Name: ENABLE_FOR_ACCESS
columns.Comments: Learning Organization enable for access

columns.Name: ENABLE_FOR_ASSIGNMENT
columns.Comments: Learning Organization enable for assignment

columns.Name: ENABLE_FOR_MANAGE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization enable for Manage

columns.Name: RECONCILE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization reconcile type {MANUAL,AUTOMATIC}

columns.Name: RECONCILE_PRIORITY
columns.Comments: Priority of the learning organization with in the list of learning organiations

columns.Name: RECONCILE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization Reconcilation Job Start Date

columns.Name: RECONCILE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization Reconcilation Job End Date

columns.Name: RECONCILE_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Learning Organization Reconcile Job last run process id

columns.Name: RECONCILE_PROCESS_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization Reconcilation Job last run process date

columns.Name: PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Learning Organization reconcile job processing status.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: IS_SYSTEM_DEFAULT
columns.Comments: Indicates seeded organization or not.
